allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/debug-bandsintown?city_slug=chicago-il" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Type: $\($data.type\)"; if \($data.type -eq "next_data"\) { Write-Host "Keys: $\($data.keys -join ', '\)" } else { Write-Host "HTML snippet:"; Write-Host \($data.html_snippet.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1000, $data.html_snippet.Length\)\)\); Write-Host "JSON blobs found: $\($data.json_blobs_found\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/debug-bandsintown?city_slug=chicago-il" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $html = $data.html_snippet; Write-Host $html.Length; $html | Select-String -Pattern "api|endpoint|graphql|/events" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 20 Value)

PowerShell(cd C:\\path; docker compose build blocal-scraper | Select-Object -Last 2; docker compose up -d blocal-scraper; Start-Sleep 4; $body = '{"city":"chicago"}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/scrape-bandsintown" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Events: $\($data.event_count\)"; docker logs blocal-scraper --tail 5)

PowerShell($body = '{"city":"new york"}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/scrape-bandsintown" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; docker logs blocal-scraper --tail 3)

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/debug-bandsintown?city_slug=chicago-il" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $html = $data.html_tail + $data.html_head; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($data.html_tail, 'ticket-vendor[^"'']{0,80}'\); $matches | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Value })
